scripts.build:data: node -e "require('fs').readdirSync('data').forEach(f => { if (f.endsWith('.json')) { const c = require('./data/' + f); require('fs').mkdirSync('dist/data', {recursive:true}); require('fs').writeFileSync('dist/data/' + f, JSON.stringify(c)); } })"
scripts.build:assets: npm run build:data && cp -r media dist/ && cp -r favicon dist/
scripts.build: mkdir -p dist/styles && npm run build:js && npm run build:css && npm run build:html && npm run build:assets
